messages.content:
According to Source 2: Acme Corp - Leave Policy, the leave policy is as follows:

1. Annual Leave: Employees are entitled to 15 days of paid annual leave per year.
2. Sick Leave: Employees may take up to 10 days of paid sick leave annually with medical documentation if required.
3. Emergency Leave (no specific details provided)

Additionally, according to Source 1: Carry Forward Policy, unused leave days may be carried forward up to a maximum of 5 days into the next year.

According to Source 6: Sample Company Policy PDF Content, the refund policy is as follows:

"Customers may request a refund within 30 days of purchase. Refunds will be processed within 7 days."
